HLSC - Integrated Life Sciences

HLSC100 Students in the University: Integrated Life Sciences (1 Credit) In a small classroom setting, Integrated Life Sciences students learn about academic resources on and off campus.

Restriction: Must be in the Honors College Integrated Life Sciences program.

Credit Only Granted for: EDCP1080, HLSC100, HONR100, or UNIV100H.
